description_long: This is a cylindrical fire extinguisher with a metallic gray body and a prominent black hose attached near the top. The extinguisher features a yellow nozzle at the end of the hose and a yellow handle grip, both of which stand out against the otherwise dark color scheme. A large, rectangular label with Korean text and pictograms is affixed to the front, providing instructions and safety information. The top of the extinguisher is equipped with a black lever, a metallic valve assembly, and a visible safety pin with a ring. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with all functional components clearly accessible. The extinguisher is designed for easy portability and rapid deployment in emergency situations.
description: A metallic gray fire extinguisher with a black hose, yellow nozzle, and a large instructional label in Korean. It features a black handle, safety pin, and a prominent valve assembly at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, black hose, yellow nozzle, and handle assembly clearly.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the cylinder, the valve assembly, and the safety pin; label is partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the hose and nozzle, with the handle and top assembly in profile.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the hose running down the back and the yellow nozzle resting against the cylinder; no label visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular label with Korean text and pictograms on the front of the cylinder; label is white with red and yellow elements.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black flexible hose attached near the top, ending in a yellow nozzle; hose is looped and secured to the side of the cylinder.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Metallic safety pin with a circular pull ring located at the top near the handle assembly.
